    "Suction line is uninsulated where required",
    "Uninsulated suction line causes condensation, water damage, and reduced system efficiency",
    "Exposed suction line can lead to capacity and efficiency loss in cooling mode"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install proper closed-cell foam insulation on suction line per manufacturer instructions",
    "Ensure insulation is continuous, sealed, and rated for line temperature and outdoor exposure",
    "Verify refrigerant line sizing and support before close-out"
  ],
  "rationale": "In a residential split-system air conditioner or heat pump, the larger suction line carrying cool refrigerant vapor back to the compressor must be insulated to prevent condensation, minimize capacity loss, and protect building materials. An uninsulated suction line at the rough-complete stage is a non-compliant, defective installation that must be corrected before the system is accepted.",
  "references": [
    "mfr install manual",
    "IMC/IRC M1401"
  ]
}
